text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 
223 
PRE_ICL_DAYS_MO_1M 
LABEL: 
Pre-ICL Standard Mail Order — Number of Days in One-Month Supply 
DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the number of days in a one-month supply of a drug on this tier, when using a 
mail order pharmacy during the pre-initial coverage limit (ICL) phase of the Part D benefit. 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
5 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS files) 
VALUES: 
—
